name: product-listing-seo-geo-optimizer
description: Full product listing optimization for both traditional SEO (Google) and GEO (AI search). Optimize title, description, bullets, images, schema, and content simultaneously for dual search visibility. Triggers: optimize listing, SEO and GEO, listing optimization, product page optimization, optimize for Google and AI,al search optimization.
metadata_note: Knowledge-based skill. No API calls required.
